description: Add goal/lifecycle.test.ts (21 tests) covering session_start disabled paths, session_shutdown, agent lifecycle hooks (agent_start, turn_start, message_end, tool_execution_end, turn_end, agent_end), before_agent_start goal injection, plan-mode integration, emitUpdated/emitCleared events, persist function, and no-UI widget skip. Goal index.ts: 66.92%→77.82% stmts, 56.32%→66.45% branches.

Extend command.test.ts (+19 tests) and tool.test.ts (+5 tests) covering: pause/resume/clear/edit edge cases (no goal, already paused/active, cancelled, unchanged), budget display/validation (none, show, no goal), /goal set with/without objective, unknown subcommand, replacement cancelled, --budget no-objective. Also get_goal without budget, update_goal no-goal error, concurrency check, disabled flag. Goal index.ts: 77.82%→94.94% stmts, 66.45%→82.27% branches.

Add goal/prompts.test.ts (28 tests) covering all prompt functions: escapeXmlText, formatDuration (all branches including hours), continuationPrompt (with/without budget, XML escape), budgetLimitPrompt, objectiveUpdatedPrompt, renderGoalContext (active/paused, with/without budget), renderGoalSummary (with/without budget), renderNoGoal, renderWidget (null, complete, active+paused+budget_limited status, with/without budget, truncate). prompts.ts now at 100% coverage.

Add 7 autoresearch loop subcommand tests (loop on/off, loop max none/infinite/invalid/status, hasCompleteMarker with nested content). autoresearch/index.ts: 91.89%→97.29% stmts, 79.54%→85.79% branches. autoresearch total: 93.45%→97.06% stmts, 85.81%→90.07% branches.

Add 21 runtime.test.ts tests covering: getGoal/getStore accessors, onToolExecutionEnd (skip goal tools, account for non-goal tools), onExternalSet (objective update prompt during active turn, budget reporting reset for new goal), maybeContinueIfIdle guards (flag off, not persisted, not idle, active turn marker, continuation active, goal id mismatch), consumeWallClockSeconds null baseline, onExternalClear, onMessageEnd (non-assistant, no usage), onAgentEnd normal stop, reset/onSessionShutdown, empty objective guard. runtime.ts: 89.26%→97.98% stmts, 79.64%→90.26% branches.
